proven.claim: Model the exit flag before and after the call
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW] – printHelp must not set the exit flag
; Model the exit flag before and after the call
(declare-const exit_before Int)
(declare-const exit_after  Int)

; Pre‑condition of the surrounding code: the process is running
(assert (= exit_before 0))

; Transition performed by printHelp:
; – it only logs to the console, which we model as a no‑op on the flag
(assert (= exit_after exit_before))

; Negated property: after the call the flag is set to “exit”
(assert (= exit_after 1))

(check-sat)
; Expected result: unsat  (the exit flag cannot become 1)
